aiOutput.summary: Automated contract review completed with notable termination and payment risks.
recommendations: Update termination rights to be mutual.
Adjust payment timing to reduce short-term cash pressure.

lawyerOutput.reviewNotes: Termination rights should be revised before signature. Payment timing is negotiable but lower priority.
recommendedEdits: Add a 30-day convenience notice period for both parties.
Include a cure period before any non-payment termination trigger.
